identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A unique identifier for each record, serving as the primary key for tracking individual items in the collection.

rights.rights: The copyright and usage rights associated with the item, specifying the legal terms for accessing and using the content.

case_id.case_id: A unique identifier for each confirmed case of COVID-19 infection, serving as the primary key for tracking individual cases.

public_healthcare_institution.public_healthcare_institution: The healthcare institution where the patient received treatment, indicating the medical facility involved in the case.

status.status: The current status of the patient, such as 'Hospitalised', 'Discharged', or other relevant states, reflecting the progression of the case.

date_of_confirmation.date_of_confirmation: The date when the case was confirmed, marking the official diagnosis of the infection.

date_of_discharge.date_of_discharge: The date when the patient was discharged from the hospital, indicating the end of their treatment period.

residing_postal_code.residing_postal_code: The postal code of the patient's residence, providing a more precise location within Singapore.

reference_url.reference_url: A URL linking to the official news release or announcement regarding the case, providing additional context and verification.

year.year: The year in which the financial data was recorded, serving as the primary key for each record.

bad_debts_written_off.bad_debts_written_off: The total amount of bad debts written off in the given year, representing uncollectible debts.

charge_off_rates.charge_off_rates: The rate at which bad debts were written off in the given year, expressed as a percentage of the total billings.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for each issue of the newspaper, serving as the primary key for tracking individual issues.

issue_date.issue_date: The date when the issue was published, indicating the timing of the content within the newspaper.

page_number.page_number: The sequential number of the page within the issue, indicating its position in the newspaper.

article_title.article_title: The title of the article, providing a brief summary or topic of the content.

shs_year.shs_year: The year in which the survey was conducted, providing a temporal context for the data.

town_estate.town_estate: The name of the town or estate where the survey data was collected, indicating the geographic location of the population being studied.

age_group.age_group: The age range of the population being surveyed, categorizing the demographic segment of interest.

percentage.percentage: The percentage of the population in the specified age group within the town or estate, representing the proportion of people in that demographic category.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the ASIR values.

gender.gender: The gender category (Male or Female) for which the ASIR values are reported, classifying the demographic group.

asir.asir: The Age-Standardized Incidence Rate (ASIR) for the specified year and gender, representing the standardized rate of occurrence of a particular condition or event per 100,000 population.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year during which the data was collected, providing a temporal context for the records.

property_type.property_type: The type of property being analyzed, categorizing the properties into different classes such as HDB, Industrial, Commercial, Private Residential, and Others.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The number of cases or instances of the property type recorded in the given financial year, indicating the frequency or count of properties in that category.

median_annual_value.median_annual_value: The median annual value of the properties in the specified category and financial year, representing the midpoint of the property values.

property_tax_collection.property_tax_collection: The total amount of property tax collected for the specified property type in the given financial year, indicating the revenue generated from property taxes.

shs_year.shs_year: The year in which the Singapore Housing Statistics (SHS) survey was conducted, providing a temporal reference for the housing data.

flat_type.flat_type: The type of flat being analyzed, categorizing the housing units into different sizes and categories such as 1-room, 2-room, 3-room, 4-room, 5-room, Executive, and All.

average_size.average_size: The average size of the flats in the specified category for the given year, measured in terms of the number of rooms, providing a quantitative measure of the typical flat size.

median_size.median_size: The median size of the flats in the specified category for the given year, measured in terms of the number of rooms, representing the middle value in the distribution of flat sizes.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the sick leave statistics.

industry1.industry1: The broad category of the industry, such as 'services' or 'manufacturing', which groups similar types of businesses together.

industry2.industry2: The specific sub-sector within the broader industry category, providing more detailed classification of the business type.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The type of sick leave taken by employees, either 'hospitalisation leave' or 'outpatient sick leave', indicating the nature of the absence.

avg_days_per_absentee.avg_days_per_absentee: The average number of days taken off by each employee who was absent due to sick leave, measuring the duration of absences.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of sick leave days per employee in the specified industry and year, indicating the overall frequency of absences.

salesperson_name.salesperson_name: The name of the salesperson, representing the individual responsible for real estate transactions.

registration_no.registration_no: A unique identifier assigned to the salesperson, serving as a key to track their registration and licensing information.

registration_start_date.registration_start_date: The date when the salesperson's registration became effective, indicating the start of their authorized period to conduct real estate transactions.

registration_end_date.registration_end_date: The date when the salesperson's registration will expire, indicating the end of their authorized period to conduct real estate transactions.

estate_agent_name.estate_agent_name: The name of the estate agency where the salesperson is registered, representing the organization they are affiliated with.

estate_agent_license_no.estate_agent_license_no: The license number of the estate agency, serving as a unique identifier for the agency and linking it to regulatory records.

financial_year.financial_year: The year in which the project or development took place, providing a temporal reference for the data.

type.type: The category or type of property or facility involved in the project, describing the nature of the development.

status.status: The current status of the project, indicating whether it has been awarded, is under construction, or has been completed.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The number of units or properties developed in the project, measuring the scale of the development. Some entries may have a dash (-) indicating missing or not applicable data.

year.year: The year in which the population data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the dataset.

population_by_gender.population_by_gender: The gender of the population being counted, categorizing the individuals as either Male or Female.

population_by_main_offence_group.population_by_main_offence_group: The main category of offence committed by the population, classifying the type of crime or violation.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals within the specified gender and offence category for the given year, representing the size of the population group.

year.year: The year in which the data was collected, providing a temporal context for the activities.

age.age: The age range of the participants, categorizing the demographic group being studied.

activity.activity: The specific activity performed by the participants, describing the type of media or non-media-related activity.

sample.sample: The sample size for the given combination of year, age, and activity, indicating the number of participants in the study.

hours.hours: The average number of hours spent on the specified activity by the participants in the given age range and year, measuring the duration of the activity.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, serving as the primary key for identifying the time period of each record.

total.total: The total count or sum of a specific metric for the given year, representing the combined value of both foreign and local components.

foreign.foreign: The count or sum of the foreign component of the metric for the given year, indicating the contribution from external sources.

local.local: The count or sum of the local component of the metric for the given year, indicating the contribution from internal sources.

year.year: The year in which the design filings were recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

design_class.design_class: The classification of the design category, describing the type of product or item for which design filings were made.

design_filings.design_filings: The number of design filings recorded in the specified year and design class, representing the volume of design registrations.

rank.rank: The ranking of the design class within the specified year, indicating its relative importance or frequency compared to other classes.

year.year: The year in which the design filings were recorded, indicating the temporal context of the data.

applicant_country.applicant_country: The country where the applicant for the design filings is based, representing the geographical origin of the applications.

design_filings.design_filings: The number of design filings made by applicants from the specified country in the given year, measuring the volume of design applications.

year.year: The year in which the financial data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the expenditure.

level_2.level_2: The subcategory or specific type of expenditure within the primary category, detailing the nature of the expense.

value.value: The monetary value of the expenditure for the specified year and category, representing the amount spent.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the annual leave entitlement distribution.

type_of_employee.type_of_employee: The category of employees being considered, such as management and executive or rank-and-file, which helps classify the group of employees.

year.year: The year in which the water quality parameter was measured, providing a temporal context for the data.

unit.unit: The unit of measurement for the average value of the water quality parameter, indicating the scale or standard used for quantification.

year.year: The year in which the enrollment data is recorded, providing a temporal context for the dataset.

level_2.level_2: The age group of grooms, categorizing the data by the age range of the male partners in the marriages.

value.value: The number of marriages recorded for the specified combination of bride and groom age groups in the given year, representing the frequency of such marriages.

month.month: The month when the data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurement.

level_2.level_2: A categorical attribute representing the specific type of eating place, such as Fast Food Outlets, Restaurants, Other Eating Places, and Food Caterers, providing a detailed classification of the main subject.

quarter.quarter: The quarter in which the data was recorded, indicating the time period for the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The category or subcategory of wholesale trade, describing the specific type of goods or services being measured.

financial_year.financial_year: The year in which the financial data is recorded, serving as the primary key for identifying the fiscal period.

operating_expenditure.operating_expenditure: The amount spent on regular operations during the financial year, representing the ongoing costs of running health services.

development_expenditure.development_expenditure: The amount allocated for development activities during the financial year, indicating investments in improving or expanding health infrastructure and services.

government_health_expenditure.government_health_expenditure: The total expenditure by the government on health during the financial year, combining both operating and development expenditures.

type.type: Specifies the detailed category or subcategory of the financial entry, such as Personal Income Tax, Corporate Income Tax, or Vehicle Quota Premiums, detailing the specific type of financial activity.

amount.amount: The monetary value associated with the financial entry, representing the amount collected or recorded for the specified financial activity.

year.year: The year in which the legal cases were recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

justice_division.justice_division: The division within the justice system that handled the cases, categorizing the type of legal proceedings.

category.category: The broad category of legal processes or cases, further classifying the type of legal activity within the justice division.

subcategory.subcategory: The specific type of legal process or case within the broader category, detailing the nature of the legal action.

count.count: The number of cases or instances recorded for the specified combination of year, justice division, category, and subcategory, quantifying the frequency of the legal activity.

year.year: The year in which the development status of the space was recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

type_of_space.type_of_space: The category or classification of the space being developed, such as Office Space or Retail Space, which specifies the type of property involved.

development_status.development_status: The current stage or status of the space development, indicating whether it is planned, under construction, or has received specific permissions, which describes the progress of the project.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: The total amount of space (in square meters or similar units) associated with the development, representing the size or scale of the project for the given year and type of space.

year.year: The year in which the data was recorded, providing a temporal context for the measurements.

level_1.level_1: The highest-level category or classification of the data, representing the broad sector or type of entity involved.

level_2.level_2: The second-level category or sub-classification of the data, providing more specific details within the broader sector defined by level_1.

value.value: The quantitative measurement or amount associated with the combination of year, level_1, and level_2, representing the value or contribution in the specified context.

month.month: The month when the data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the air passenger departures.

level_1.level_1: The category of the data, which in this case is always 'Number Of Air Passenger Departures', describing the type of metric being measured.

level_2.level_2: The geographical region where the air passenger departures occurred, categorizing the data by different parts of the world.

value.value: The number of air passenger departures for the specified month and region, representing the quantitative measurement of the metric.

month.month: The month when the foreign reserve data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurements.

total_foreign_reserve_sgd.total_foreign_reserve_sgd: The total amount of foreign reserves held by the country in Singapore Dollars (SGD), representing the overall value of the reserves in the national currency.

special_drawing_rights.special_drawing_rights: The amount of Special Drawing Rights (SDRs) held as part of the foreign reserves, which are international reserve assets created by the International Monetary Fund (IMF).

imf_reserve_position.imf_reserve_position: The position of the country in the IMF reserve, indicating the country's share in the IMF's general resources account.

gold_and_foreign_exchange.gold_and_foreign_exchange: The value of gold and foreign exchange held as part of the foreign reserves, representing the physical and financial assets in the reserves.

total_foreign_reserve_usd.total_foreign_reserve_usd: The total amount of foreign reserves held by the country in United States Dollars (USD), providing a standardized measure of the reserves in a globally recognized currency.

month.month: The month when the energy consumption data was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurement.

housing_type.housing_type: The type of housing, categorizing the main subject into public, private, or other housing types, which helps in understanding the context of the energy consumption.

dwelling_type.dwelling_type: The specific type of dwelling within the housing category, providing more detailed classification of the living space, such as 1-Room / 2-Room, 3-Room, 4-Room, 5-Room and Executive, Landed Properties, and Private Apartments and Condominiums.

tg_consumption_gwh.tg_consumption_gwh: The total gas consumption in gigawatt-hours (GWh) for the specified month and dwelling type, measuring the energy usage of the main subject.

year.year: The year in which the net enrolment rate was recorded, providing a temporal context for the data.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational level at which the net enrolment rate is measured, categorizing the data by the stage of education.

sex.sex: The gender category for which the net enrolment rate is reported, allowing for disaggregation by male (M), female (F), or both (MF).

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The percentage of the official school-age population enrolled in the specified level of education, serving as the primary metric for assessing educational participation.

year.year: The year in which the vaccination doses were administered, providing a temporal context for the data.

vaccination_type.vaccination_type: The type of vaccination administered, categorizing the specific vaccine being tracked.

no_of_doses_in_thousands.no_of_doses_in_thousands: The number of doses administered in thousands, measuring the volume of the vaccination program for the specified year and type.

month.month: The month when the visitor arrivals were recorded, indicating the temporal context of the data.

level_1.level_1: The highest-level category describing the type of visitor arrivals, which is consistently 'Total International Visitor Arrivals By Country Of Residence', providing context for the dataset.

level_2.level_2: The continent or region from which the visitors originate, categorizing the data by geographical area.

level_3.level_3: The specific country or sub-region within the continent or region, further detailing the origin of the visitors.

value.value: The number of international visitor arrivals from the specified country or sub-region in the given month, representing the quantitative measure of tourist activity.

month.month: The month in which the measurement was taken, indicating the temporal context of the data.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of mail being measured, providing a classification for the data.

value.value: The quantitative measurement of the mail volume for the specified month and category, representing the amount of mail processed.

year.year: The year in which the wage data was collected, providing a temporal context for the records.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The occupation description, specifying the job role or position being analyzed.

estab_size1.estab_size1: A categorical descriptor indicating the size category of the establishment, providing context on the scale of the organization.

estab_size2.estab_size2: A more detailed categorical descriptor of the establishment size, further specifying the number of employees in the organization.

age_grp1.age_grp1: The age group of the employees, categorizing the workforce by age range.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of the monthly gross wage for the specified occupation, establishment size, and age group, representing the typical total earnings before deductions.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of the monthly basic wage for the specified occupation, establishment size, and age group, representing the typical base salary before bonuses or other additions.

year.year: The year in which the wage data was collected, providing a temporal context for the dataset.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The occupation description, identifying the specific job role or position being analyzed.

ind1.ind1: A broad industry category, classifying the general sector in which the occupation is found.

ind2.ind2: A more specific industry subcategory, providing detailed classification within the broader industry.

mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of the monthly gross wage for the specified occupation and industry, indicating the wage above which 25% of workers fall.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) of the monthly gross wage for the specified occupation and industry, representing the middle value of the wage distribution.

mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of the monthly gross wage for the specified occupation and industry, indicating the wage below which 25% of workers fall.

mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of the monthly basic wage for the specified occupation and industry, indicating the basic wage above which 25% of workers fall.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) of the monthly basic wage for the specified occupation and industry, representing the middle value of the basic wage distribution.

mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of the monthly basic wage for the specified occupation and industry, indicating the basic wage below which 25% of workers fall.
